languages.text: {n}Мужчина сотрясается всем телом, после чего резко замирает. Судорожно всхлипывая, он шепчет с глупой улыбкой.{/n} "Боль... Угаснет... Знамя династии! Мой долг..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."
languages.original_text: {n}Мужчина сотрясается всем телом, после чего резко замирает. Судорожно всхлипывая, он шепчет с глупой улыбкой.{/n} "Боль... Угаснет... Знамя династии! Мой долг..."

traits.locale_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."
"The pain... will fade? I'll master... this flesh... and do my duty... My duty..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."

languages.text: 「痛み…消えるのか？この肉体を支配し、任務に復帰する…」
languages.original_text: "The pain... will fade? I will master this flesh and return to my duty..."

traits.locale_text: 「痛み…消えるのか？この肉体を支配し、任務に復帰する…」

languages.text: {n}他全身颤抖了一下，然后猛地僵住。他一边抽泣，一边带着痴傻的笑容低声说：{/n}“痛苦……会消退的……王朝的旗帜！我的职责……”
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."

traits.locale_text: {n}他全身颤抖了一下，然后猛地僵住。他一边抽泣，一边带着痴傻的笑容低声说：{/n}“痛苦……会消退的……王朝的旗帜！我的职责……”

languages.text: {n}Il est pris de frissons, puis se fige soudain. Sanglotant, il murmure, un sourire sans joie sur les lèvres :{/n} « La douleur... s'évanouira... La bannière de la dynastie ! Mon devoir... »
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il est pris de frissons, puis se fige soudain. Sanglotant, il murmure, un sourire sans joie sur les lèvres :{/n} « La douleur... s'évanouira... La bannière de la dynastie ! Mon devoir... »

languages.text: {n}Su cuerpo se estremece, después queda inmóvil repentinamente. Sollozando, susurra con una sonrisa embobada:{/n} «El dolor... desaparecerá... ¡El estandarte de la dinastía! Mi deber...».
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Su cuerpo se estremece, después queda inmóvil repentinamente. Sollozando, susurra con una sonrisa embobada:{/n} «El dolor... desaparecerá... ¡El estandarte de la dinastía! Mi deber...».

languages.text: {n}Bütün vücudu ürperiyor, ardından aniden donakalıyor. Hıçkırarak, aptalca bir gülümsemeyle fısıldıyor.{/n} "Acı... Dinecek... Hanedanlığın sancağı! Vazifem..."
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bütün vücudu ürperiyor, ardından aniden donakalıyor. Hıçkırarak, aptalca bir gülümsemeyle fısıldıyor.{/n} "Acı... Dinecek... Hanedanlığın sancağı! Vazifem..."

languages.text: {n}Sein ganzer Körper erzittert, ehe er plötzlich erstarrt. Schluchzend flüstert er mit einem freudlosen Lächeln:{/n} "Der Schmerz ... wird verblassen ... Das Banner der Dynastie! Meine Pflicht ..."
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."
